message:
feat(hybrid): add lazy-load Q2K infrastructure via ExpertCache

Implements memory-safe hybrid mode architecture:
- Q2K weights lazy-loaded through ExpertCache with LRU eviction
- CSR outliers pinned in RAM (1.7 GB)
- Avoids OOM by not pre-loading all 768 expert tensors
- Added TensorInfo type for Q2K tensor lookup
- Added setHybridQ2KSource() and getOrCreateHybridQ2KBuffer()
- Q2K loader kept alive for mmap access during inference

NOTE: Hybrid mode temporarily disabled pending Q2K kernel implementation.
The Q2K sparse kernels are scaffolded but need proper dequantization
logic to produce correct output.
